entry.title: Spring in Paris, or the Crazy Night
entry.summary: A couple days ago we made a run to IKEA to get a little furniture to spruce up our place, and I came home with a painting to put on the wall (an unplanned purchase, but I like Paris, so why not?). The picture is called Printemps à Paris (Spring in Paris) and was taken by a lady from Alberta. I decided to make a video of us putting it up and it turned out hilarious!
entry.content:
A couple days ago we made a run to IKEA to get a little furniture to spruce up our place, and I came home with a painting to put on the wall (an unplanned purchase, but I like Paris, so why not?). The picture is called Printemps à Paris (Spring in Paris) and was taken by a lady from Alberta. I decided to make a video of us putting it up and it turned out hilarious!

The video was done in time lapse style, taking one frame every 5 seconds with a 1 second exposure, and then playing back at 1/8 sec per frame. I took almost 1900 frames, so this 4 minutes of video covers 3 hours of real time!
